strategies.exit_rule: After the daily close, if the rule maps to zero TQQQ, remove TQQQ exposure at the next session open.

same_close_exception.warning: daily data cannot verify actual after-hours fill

signals.name: TQQQ_COMPOSITE_REGIME_LADDER Composite regime ladder signal
signals.rule: Use 100% TQQQ if QQQ close > QQQ 200-day SMA AND QQQ 126-day ROC > 0 AND QQQ 21-day annualized realized volatility < 0.30 AND VXN < 35; use 66.7% TQQQ if QQQ close > QQQ 200-day SMA AND QQQ 60-day ROC > 0; use QQQ-only exposure if QQQ close > QQQ 150-day SMA; otherwise 0% TQQQ

strategies.entry_rule: After the daily close, if the rule maps to nonzero TQQQ, apply the rule-defined target TQQQ exposure at the next session open.
strategies.exit_rule: After the daily close, if the rule maps to zero TQQQ, remove TQQQ exposure at the next session open.

same_close_exception.warning: daily data cannot verify actual after-hours fill

signals.name: TQQQ_VOTE_3_OF_5 Strict 3-of-5 vote signal
signals.rule: Risk-on if at least 3 of 5 are true: QQQ close > QQQ 200-day SMA; QQQ 126-day ROC > 0; QQQ 21-day annualized realized volatility < 0.35; VIX < 25; at least 3 of QQQ, SPY, XLK, SOXX, IWM are above their 50-day SMA

strategies.entry_rule: After the daily close, if the rule maps to nonzero TQQQ, apply the rule-defined target TQQQ exposure at the next session open.
strategies.exit_rule: After the daily close, if the rule maps to zero TQQQ, remove TQQQ exposure at the next session open.

same_close_exception.warning: daily data cannot verify actual after-hours fill

signals.name: TQQQ_VOTE_2_OF_4 Strict 2-of-4 vote signal
signals.rule: Risk-on if at least 2 of 4 are true: QQQ close > QQQ 200-day SMA; QQQ 126-day ROC > 0; VIX < 25; LQD 63-day ROC > SHY 63-day ROC
